name: Habab ibn Harith
title: Brave of Salman
shortDescription: A brave companion of Imam Hussain (AS) who fought alongside him and was martyred in Karbala.
fullStory:
Habab ibn Harith al-Salmani (or Habab ibn Amr) was another star in the sky of Ashura. With firm faith, he chose the path of truth and made his way from Kufa to Imam Hussain (AS).

On Ashura, Habab lined up against the wave of Ibn Ziyad's soldiers with indescribable love. Knowing that the end of this path was martyrdom, he defended the Prophet's (PBUH) sanctuary with a tranquil heart.

During the first attack and the extensive shower of enemy arrows, Habab ibn Harith fought with all his might and shielded the arrows with his chest.

After a valiant fight, he attained the great grace of martyrdom along with a large group of the Imam's devoted companions, and his name was recorded in history.
quote: (Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya:) Peace be upon Habab ibn Harith...
